stemHtml: Upon departure from London, the flight encounters a problem which requires a return to the airport for landing and the crew declares an urgency. The aircraft is above its maximum landing mass. To reduce the mass for a safe landing…

options.a: The crew should advice ATC and obtain clearance to an area and a sufficient altitude before starting dumping fuel.
options.b: The crew can start fuel dumping immediately at their own discretion.
options.c: There is no need to dump fuel and the flight can return immediately for a landing.
options.d: The crew should fly directly on current heading climbing to 4000 ft to start fuel dumping.
